parameters.query: SELECT location_id, location_name, ad_name, ad_id, campaign_name, adset_name, spend, impressions, clicks, leads, cpl, cpl_avg, cpl_delta_pct, ctr, ctr_avg, ctr_delta_pct, is_anomaly, anomaly_reason, reference_date FROM vw_ads_anomaly_detection WHERE is_anomaly = true ORDER BY cpl_delta_pct DESC NULLS LAST

INSERT INTO n8n_schedule_tracking (field, unique_id, location_id, status, metadata, created_at) VALUES ('ads_anomaly_alert', 'daily_' || TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), NULL, 'no_anomalies', '{"anomaly_count": 0}'::jsonb, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (field, unique_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'no_anomalies', updated_at = NOW()
